13:1:1.m: Alif Lam Meem Ra (special Quranic opening letters)

13:1:2.m: that (feminine, farther away, pointing to ءَايٰتُ/verses)

13:1:5.m: and that which (connects to تِلْكَ ءَايٰتُ ٱلْكِتٰبِ)

13:1:13.m: of the people (possessed by أَكْثَرَ - most)

13:2:4.m: of the heavens/skies (object of رَفَعَ - raised)

13:2:12.m: and He controlled/subjected (the sun and moon)

13:2:13.m: the sun (object of وَسَخَّرَ - and He subjected)

13:2:14.m: and the moon (object of وَسَخَّرَ - He subjected)

13:2:16.m: it flows/runs (subject of كُلٌّ - each one)

13:2:20.m: the matter (being managed by يُدَبِّرُ - He manages)

13:2:21.m: he explains in detail (subject of يُدَبِّرُ - he arranges)

13:2:22.m: the signs or miracles (object of يُفَصِّلُ)

13:2:26.m: you all become completely sure (about meeting your Lord)

13:3:2.m: the one who (connects وَهُوَ to what follows)

13:3:4.m: the earth (object of مَدَّ - spread out)

13:3:6.m: in it (feminine, referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)

13:3:7.m: mountains (as firmly fixed anchors) (object of جَعَلَ)

13:3:12.m: he made/placed (connected to رَوٰسِىَ mountains and أَنْهٰرًا rivers)

13:3:13.m: in it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

13:3:14.m: two pairs (object of جَعَلَ - He made)

13:3:17.m: the night (object being covered by يُغْشِى)

13:3:23.m: for a people who stand together (subject of يَتَفَكَّرُونَ)

13:4:3.m: pieces (as the subject of the sentence)

13:4:4.m: multiple things next to each other (with emphasis)

13:4:6.m: from/of (after a word ending in ن or م)

13:4:10.m: pairs (of palm trees growing from same root) in general

صِنْوَ: pairs (of palm trees growing from same root)

13:4:12.m: pairs (of date palms growing from same root)

انٍ: (of date palms growing from same root)

13:4:13.m: it is given drink (with بِمَآءٍ وٰحِدٍ/one water)

13:4:16.m: and we make superior (some over others in taste)

13:4:21.m: the fruit/produce (that is being compared in taste/quality)

أُكُلِ: fruit/produce (that is being compared in taste/quality)

13:4:24.m: that (pointing to something far) (refers to the signs in the previous ayah)

كَ: refers to the signs in the previous ayah

13:4:25.m: surely/indeed signs (emphasized signs in إِنَّ فِى ذٰلِكَ)

13:4:26.m: for a people (who use their reason)

13:5:2.m: you (are) amazed (in response to إِن if)

13:5:3.m: then [it is] a wonder! (connected to تَعْجَبْ - you wonder)

13:5:8.m: Is it true that we...? (expressing disbelief)

13:5:10.m: a creation (being acted upon in this ayah)

13:5:16.m: and those (pointing to the disbelievers mentioned before)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to the disbelievers mentioned before)

13:5:20.m: and those (referring to the disbelievers mentioned)

13:5:21.m: companions (plural, subject of هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ)

13:5:24.m: in it (referring to النَّارِ - the Fire)

13:6:1.m: and they seek to hurry you

13:6:2.m: with the evil deed (what they are hastening for in يَسْتَعْجِلُونَكَ)

13:6:6.m: it/she passed away (referring to examples/punishments مَثُلَات)

13:6:15.m: upon/on (preposition showing responsibility for ظُلْمِهِمْ - their wrongdoing)

13:7:4.m: why not/if only (expressing regret about أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

13:8:1.m: Allah (the one true God) (subject of يَعْلَمُ)

13:11:2.m: female angels who follow very closely/persistently (subject of يَحْفَظُونَهُ)

13:11:8.m: they protect/guard him (referring to how the guardians protect each person)

13:11:13.m: Allah (as the object of يُغَيِّرُ - changes)

13:11:19.m: they change intensively (subject of حَتَّىٰ - until)

13:11:27.m: so there is no/then there is no

13:11:29.m: to/for him (referring to the one who has مُعَقِّبٰتٌ protecting him)

13:12:1.m: he/it (independent form that stands alone) (subject of يُرِيكُمُ - shows you)

هُوَ: he/it (independent form that stands alone) (subject of يُرِيكُمُ - shows you)

13:12:4.m: the lightning (what Allah shows in يُرِيكُمُ)

13:12:5.m: fearfully (describing how He shows you the lightning)

ًا: fully (describing how He shows you the lightning)

13:12:8.m: the clouds (being brought forth by يُنشِئُ)

13:13:1.m: and he glorifies repeatedly/perfectly (subject: ٱلرَّعْدُ - the thunder)

13:13:3.m: with/by his praise (acted on by يُسَبِّحُ)

13:13:7.m: and he sends (connected to يُسَبِّحُ - glorifies)

13:13:8.m: the thunderbolts (object of يُرْسِلُ - he sends)

13:13:10.m: with it (referring to الصَّوٰعِقَ - the thunderbolts)

13:13:18.m: strong/intense (subject of وَهُوَ - and He is)

13:14:1.m: for him/it (referring to the call of truth)

13:14:17.m: so that/in order that he reaches

13:15:9.m: and their shadows (that prostrate to Allah)

13:16:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

13:16:3.m: Lord (subject of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)

13:16:5.m: and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)

13:16:6.m: say! (commanding one person to tell others about Allah)

13:16:9.m: did you all take for yourselves?

13:16:12.m: protectors, guardians (as objects of اتَّخَذْتُم - you have taken)

13:16:22.m: the blind one (contrasted with ٱلْبَصِيرُ/the seeing one)

13:16:23.m: and the one who sees/perceives deeply (opposite of الْأَعْمَىٰ)

13:16:35.m: and so it became similar (to His creation)

13:16:39.m: Allah (as the answer to 'Who is the Lord of the heavens and earth?')

ُ: (as the answer to 'Who is the Lord of the heavens and earth?')

13:16:44.m: The One (a name of Allah showing His absolute uniqueness)

وَاحِدُ: One (a name of Allah showing His absolute uniqueness)

13:16:45.m: The All-Dominant (one of Allah's names showing His complete power over all creation)

ُ: (one of Allah's names showing His complete power over all creation)

13:17:1.m: he sent down (referring to Allah sending down rain)

13:17:4.m: water (object of أَنزَلَ - He sent down)

13:17:5.m: and then she/it flowed (after مَآءً water)

13:17:7.m: by its measure (referring to the valleys)

13:17:10.m: foam (object being carried by السَّيْلُ/the flood)

13:17:35.m: the people (object of يَنفَعُ - what benefits)

13:17:38.m: the earth/land (being acted upon by فِى)

13:17:39.m: like that (referring to the previous example in the ayah)

ذٰلِكَ: that (referring to the previous example in the ayah)

13:17:41.m: Allah (as the subject of يَضْرِبُ - He sets forth)

13:17:42.m: the examples (object of يَضْرِبُ - sets forth)

13:18:2.m: they responded willingly (to رَبِّهِمُ - their Lord)

13:18:15.m: all together (describing how something is done)

13:18:16.m: and its equivalent (referring to what is in the earth)

13:18:17.m: with him/it (referring to everything on earth)

13:18:18.m: surely they would free/save themselves (by giving something valuable)

13:18:23.m: the counting and tracking of deeds

13:18:26.m: and how evil! (criticizing جَهَنَّمُ as a resting place)

13:18:27.m: the place that is spread out (subject of بِئْسَ - how wretched)

13:19:5.m: to you (object of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

13:19:8.m: the truth/reality (subject of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)

13:19:13.m: he remembers/takes heed (in response to يَعْلَمُ - he knows)

13:20:2.m: they fulfill (subject of الَّذِينَ - those who)

13:20:7.m: the covenant (object of يُوفُونَ - they fulfill)

13:21:3.m: what (that which connects وَٱلَّذِينَ يَصِلُونَ with أَمَرَ)

13:21:12.m: harm, trouble (object of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)

13:21:13.m: the reckoning (object of يَخَافُونَ - they fear)

13:22:3.m: seeking earnestly (object of صَبَرُوا - they were patient)

13:22:10.m: we provided them (referring to what Allah gave them)

13:22:13.m: and they push away (referring to those who are patient mentioned earlier in verse)

13:22:16.m: those (pointing to a group far away)

أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ: those (pointing to a group far away)

13:23:1.m: gardens (subject of يَدْخُلُونَهَا - they enter them)

13:23:5.m: he became good/righteous (connected to مَن who/whoever)

13:23:9.m: and their descendants/offspring (connected to ءَابَآئِهِمْ وَأَزْوٰجِهِمْ - their fathers and spouses)

13:24:4.m: you (all) endured patiently (because of which you receive سَلٰمٌ/peace)

13:25:2.m: they break/violate (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)

13:25:13.m: that (connects to يُوصَلَ - to be joined)

13:25:14.m: it is joined/connected (what Allah commanded to be joined)

13:25:15.m: and they corrupt/are corrupting (connected to يَنقُضُونَ - they break)

13:25:20.m: the curse (subject of لَهُمُ - belongs to them)

13:25:22.m: evil (subject of لَهُمْ - belongs to them)

13:26:6.m: and he measures/restricts (paired with يَبْسُطُ - he extends)

13:26:8.m: with/by the life (connected to وَفَرِحُوا۟ - and they rejoiced)

13:27:4.m: why not (questioning the disbelievers' demand for a sign)

13:27:11.m: indeed/certainly (introduces the statement that اللَّهَ يُضِلُّ - Allah misguides)

13:27:14.m: whoever (subject of يُضِلُّ - He leads astray)

13:29:2.m: they believed (connected to وَعَمِلُوا۟ - and they did)

13:29:8.m: a final place of return (possessed by حُسْنُ)

13:30:4.m: a community (being described in this ayah)

13:30:6.m: she/it passed by (referring to أُمَّةٍ - a community)

13:30:10.m: so that you two recite (with emphasis)

13:30:23.m: except (connects to لَآ إِلٰهَ - there is no god)

13:30:27.m: and to him/it (connected to مَتَابِ - return)

13:31:4.m: it was made to move (referring to الْجِبَالُ - the mountains)

13:31:6.m: the mountains (subject of سُيِّرَتْ - were moved)

13:31:8.m: it (feminine) was cut intensively/into many pieces

13:31:10.m: the earth (subject of being split/torn apart)

13:31:13.m: with/by means of it (referring to قُرْءَانًا)

13:31:28.m: all the people (as the object being guided by Allah)

13:31:34.m: it strikes them (referring to a disaster striking the disbelievers)

13:31:37.m: a calamity (that strikes them because of what they did)

13:31:44.m: he comes/arrives (until وَعْدُ ٱللَّهِ - Allah's promise)

13:31:48.m: Allah (as the object of يَأْتِىَ - comes)

13:32:6.m: so I gave extra time (to those who disbelieved)

13:33:1.m: is it then who (questioning about the one maintaining)

13:33:27.m: for those who (connected to مَكْرُهُمْ - their plot)

13:33:29.m: their plot (that was made attractive to them)

13:33:30.m: and they were blocked/prevented (from السَّبِيلِ - the path)

13:33:34.m: He (Allah) lets go astray (whoever He wills)

13:33:36.m: then what/then not (connects to يُضْلِلِ - leads astray)

13:33:39.m: a guide (after مِنْ in this ayah)

13:35:8.m: beneath it (referring to الْجَنَّةِ - the garden)

13:35:10.m: its food/sustenance (referring to الْجَنَّةِ - the garden/paradise)

13:35:12.m: and its shade (connected to أُكُلُهَا - its food)

13:35:13.m: that (feminine, far) (pointing to عُقْبَى - the end result)

13:36:4.m: they (those who were given the Book) feel joy/happiness

ونَ: they (those who were given the Book)

13:36:5.m: with what/that which (connects يَفْرَحُونَ to أُنزِلَ)

13:36:12.m: part of it (acted upon by يُنكِرُ - denies)

13:36:16.m: that (connecting the command to its purpose)

13:36:18.m: Allah (as the object of أَعْبُدَ - I worship)

َ: (as the object of أَعْبُدَ - I worship)

13:36:25.m: place of return (connected to إِلَيْهِ - to Him)

13:37:8.m: after what (follows جَآءَكَ - came to you)

13:38:11.m: he was (past tense verb in this ayah)

13:38:15.m: with any sign/miracle (object of يَأْتِىَ - to come)

13:38:20.m: an appointed time/deadline (possessed by something else)

13:39:5.m: and he makes firm (after يَمْحُوا - he erases)

13:40:4.m: some/part of (object of نُرِيَنَّكَ - we show you)

13:40:8.m: we will definitely take/receive you completely

13:40:11.m: the conveyance (subject of being upon you)

13:41:1.m: And have they not yet...? (connecting negative question marker)

13:41:5.m: the earth (object being affected by نَأْتِى - we come to)

َ: (object being affected by نَأْتِى - we come to)

13:41:6.m: we decrease it (referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)

13:41:9.m: and God (as the subject of يَحْكُمُ)

13:42:7.m: the plotting (referring to the plotting mentioned in وَقَدْ مَكَرَ)

13:42:8.m: all together (describing how something is done)

13:42:15.m: the disbelievers (subject of سَيَعْلَمُ - will know)

13:42:18.m: of/for the home/dwelling (end result of عُقْبَى)

13:43:5.m: a messenger (object of لَسْتَ - you are not)

13:43:8.m: by Allah (as a witness between كَفَىٰ and شَهِيدًۢا)

13:43:9.m: as a witness (in relation to كَفَىٰ/sufficient)
